ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_conversions" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion entry */,
  "international_standard" TEXT /* International standard for size conversion (e.g., European, French, Italian, Ukrainian, American) */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* ISO code for the region */,
  "xs_size" TEXT /* Size XS in the given international standard */,
  "s_size" TEXT /* Size S in the given international standard */,
  "m_size" TEXT /* Size M in the given international standard */,
  "l_size" TEXT /* Size L in the given international standard */,
  "conversion_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or guidelines for size conversion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., Women's Tops, Men's Shirts) */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material composition of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product for shipping calculations */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product packaging */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the price is denominated */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "is_available" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the product is currently available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product size entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit identifier for each size variant */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the product (e.g., XS, S, M, L) */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product available in stock */,
  "low_stock_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold to indicate when stock is low and needs replenishment */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the stock quantity was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used for the order */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated date of delivery */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Status of any returns associated with the order */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the total amount is denominated */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id")
)
